codeReview.summary: The deprecated-seams documentation in docs/modules/invoice.md comprehensively catalogs 8 retired dealer finance paths, each with a canonical replacement. The documentation is code-grounded (confirmed by DealerControllerSecurityIT tests proving these paths return 404, and by openapi.json not containing any of the retired paths). Canonical replacement paths (/api/v1/portal/finance/* and /api/v1/dealer-portal/*) are confirmed to exist in both source code (PortalFinanceController, DealerPortalController) and openapi.json. The documentation is discoverable from docs/INDEX.md → docs/modules/MODULE-INVENTORY.md → docs/modules/invoice.md. Freshness marker is present (Last reviewed: 2026-03-30). Cross-references to admin-portal-rbac.md are consistent on host ownership.

summary: PASS. The deprecated/non-canonical paths section in docs/modules/invoice.md (lines 179-196) catalogs 8 retired commercial finance paths, each with a specific canonical replacement. All 8 retired paths are confirmed absent from openapi.json and return 404 in integration tests (DealerControllerSecurityIT). All 3 canonical portal finance endpoints and 7 dealer-portal endpoints are verified present in source code. The documentation is discoverable from the root index and MODULE-INVENTORY.md, carries a freshness marker, and cross-references are consistent with admin-portal-rbac.md. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
